description_long: This is a compact rectangular keyboard with a white main body and a set of raised keys in black, gray, and red colors. The keys are arranged in a standard grid, with the red keys likely representing special function or modifier keys. A single brown cable extends from one side, indicating it is a wired keyboard. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a slight matte finish, and the keycaps are slightly elevated above the main chassis. The keyboard is relatively low-profile and does not feature a separate numeric keypad, suggesting a tenkeyless or compact layout. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the exterior.
description: A compact, white keyboard with black, gray, and red keys, featuring a single brown cable. The keys are raised and the body is smooth and matte.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, with the cable extending away from the viewer and all key colors visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's low profile and the brown cable emerging from the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cable extending directly toward the viewer, showing the back edge of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the cable attachment and the staggered arrangement of the keys.
